output.code:
# Load the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-Ki4y1nwTVYXCEpm6AKZtYX-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:1000], len(raw)

candidates = [
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَأَوَّاهٌ حَلِيمٌ",
    "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لَحَلِيمٌ أَوَّاهٌ مُنِيبٌ",
    "فَبَشَّرْنَاهُ بِغُلَامٍ حَلِيمٍ",
    "إِنَّكَ لَأَنْتَ الْحَلِيمُ الرَّشِيدُ",
    "إِنَّا لَنَرَاكَ فِي سَفَاهَةٍ وَإِنَّا لَنَظُنُّكَ مِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ",
    "قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِي سَفَاهَةٌ وَلَكِنِّي رَسُولٌ مِنْ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ",
    "أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسَالَاتِ رَبِّي",
    "أَنَا لَكُمْ نَاصِحٌ أَمِينٌ",
    "إِنِّي أَرَى فِي الْمَنَامِ أَنِّي أَذْبَحُكَ",
    "فَانْظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَى",
    "سَتَجِدُنِي إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ مِنَ الصَّابِرِينَ",
]
for s in candidates:
    i = raw.find(s)
    if i != -1:
        print("Found:", s, "at", i)
        print(raw[i-40:i+len(s)+40])
    else:
        print("Not found:", s)

spans = []
for s in candidates:
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = raw.find(s, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        # Determine end
        end = i + len(s)
        # Trim edges: from left, remove any whitespace or quotes or punctuation if they appear immediately around the span
        left = i
        right = end
        # trim left
        while left < end and raw[left] in " \n\t\f\r\"'«»“”'([{<":  # include opening punctuation
            left += 1
        # trim right
        while right > i and raw[right-1] in " \n\t\f\r\"'»»“”'.,؛:!?…]>)]}»<":  # include punctuation
            right -= 1
        trimmed = raw[left:right]
        # verify equals s
        if trimmed != s:
            # Try alternative: keep original i as start if trimming broke equality
            left = i
            right = end
            trimmed = raw[left:right]
            if trimmed != s:
                # as a fallback, locate exact s again
                i2 = raw.find(s, left)
                if i2 != -1:
                    i = i2
                    left = i
                    right = i + len(s)
                    trimmed = raw[left:right]
        spans.append({"start": left, "end": right, "span_text": s, "citation_type": "Aya"})
        start = i + len(s)
# Show spans
len(spans), spans[:5]

# Build final spans with sorting
spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x['start'])
for sp in spans_sorted:
    sp['span_start'] = sp.pop('start')
    sp['span_end'] = sp.pop('end')
spans_sorted[:5], len(spans_sorted)
